mission: Implement Phase 2 of three-layer performance optimization: Parallel Dispatch for bounded concurrent tool execution

what_was_done.summary: Phase 1 — ToolCache implemented and verified. New ToolCache service (~73 lines) with Ref<Map> + Deferred inflight dedup. Wired into tool.ts, registry.ts, app-runtime.ts. 8 cacheable tools marked. Typecheck passes with 0 new errors.
files_modified: packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts — cacheable marker, cache logic in wrap(), ToolCache.Service in define()
critic_conditions_satisfied: COND-003: cacheable?: boolean marker to Tool.Def — only opt-in tools traverse cache path
COND-004: ToolCache uses Ref<Map> with inflight dedup via Deferred — keyed by ${toolID}:${JSON.stringify(args)}
Cache stores pre-truncation result — truncation runs fresh on retrieval
Effect.annotateCurrentSpan({ cache.hit: true/false }) emitted on every cache access
Cache invalidates when non-cacheable (write/edit) tool executes
Only cache: read_source, grep, glob, read, read_artifact, read_lib, rig_schema_validate, rig_jsonl_query
lessons_learned: toolcache-execute-type-narrowing: getOrCompute needs generic R param + as any casts for Effect v4 invariant
background-task-execution: background tasks don't always appear on dashboard; check filesystem

remaining_work.description: Add 5-permit Effect.Semaphore in session/tools.ts to bound concurrent tool execution. ~5 lines, 1 file.
fix: Create `const semaphore = yield* Semaphore.make(5)` after EffectBridge.make()
Wrap both built-in and MCP tool execute callbacks with `semaphore.withPermit()`

remaining_work.description: Offload shell tool CPU-bound AST parsing to Effect worker thread. ~350 lines, 5 files.

architectural_warnings: Phase 2 and Phase 1 both touch the execute/closure chain in the same region. Exact line anchors must be specified to avoid merge conflicts between phases.
Phase 2 wraps the execute callbacks in session/tools.ts — not tool.ts. Phase 1 operates inside wrap() in tool.ts. No actual overlap, but be aware of the seam.
Pin effect to exact semver in package.json before Phase 3's unstable/workers API usage.
